_comment: Progressive check description registry. Keys are doc paths or phase::target patterns. Values are rich descriptions used in check snapshots instead of generic templates. Fallback chain: exact doc match → phase::target match → generic template.

by_doc.interfaces/claude-interface/index.md: Verify Claude interface loads with navigation, theme selector, and markdown rendering
by_doc.interfaces/main-navigator/index.md: Verify main navigator loads with left panel sections, center panel, and right panel
by_doc.interfaces/task-workflow/index.md: Verify task workflow interface loads with task stages and progress indicators
by_doc.interfaces/tests-interface/index.md: Verify tests interface loads with test history grid and LED status indicators

by_phase.Interface: Verify {target} interface renders correctly in {panel} panel with all interactive widgets functional
by_phase.Profil: Verify {target} profile page loads with personal information and navigation links
by_phase.Publications: Verify {target} publication renders with formatted content, metadata, and proof artifacts
by_phase.Hubs: Verify {target} hub page loads with section links and content navigation
by_phase.Documentation: Verify {target} documentation page renders with structured content and cross-references
by_phase.Histoires: Verify {target} story page loads with narrative content and embedded media
by_phase.Méthodologies: Verify {target} methodology document renders with procedure steps and reference tables
by_phase.Configurations: Verify {target} configuration page loads with settings and parameter tables
by_phase.Commandes: Verify {target} command reference renders with syntax, examples, and parameter descriptions
by_phase.Essentiels: Verify {target} essential page loads with core content and navigation structure
